name: FOXY BOT
description: Smart WhatsApp Bot powered by AI — auto-fetches and runs the latest bot build on every deploy.

SESSION_ID.description: REQUIRED: Your WhatsApp session ID. Must begin with 'FOXY-BOT:'

DATABASE_URL.description: OPTIONAL: PostgreSQL connection string for persistent storage. Supports Heroku Postgres, Supabase, Neon, Railway, etc. Format: postgres://user:password@host:5432/dbname?sslmode=require — Leave blank to run on SQLite only.

OWNER_NUMBER.description: OPTIONAL: Your WhatsApp number in international format without + (e.g. 254712345678). Grants owner privileges.

BOT_NAME.description: OPTIONAL: Display name shown in menus and messages. Defaults to 'FOXY BOT'.

BOT_PREFIX.description: OPTIONAL: Command prefix (e.g. . or ! or ?). Defaults to '.'.

BOT_MODE.description: OPTIONAL: Operating mode — public, private, group, solo, sudo, super, buttons, or channel. Defaults to 'public'.

BOT_TIMEZONE.description: OPTIONAL: Timezone for time/date display (e.g. Africa/Nairobi, Asia/Kolkata, America/New_York). Defaults to UTC.

PTERODACTYL_KEY.description: OPTIONAL: Your Pterodactyl Application API key (ptlc_...). Required only for panel commands.

PTERODACTYL_URL.description: OPTIONAL: Your Pterodactyl panel URL (e.g. https://panel.example.com). Required only for panel commands.

PAYSTACK_KEY.description: OPTIONAL: Your Paystack secret key (sk_live_... or sk_test_...). Required only for payment features.
